testsuites.name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests

testsuite.name: 00_Health / GET /health - service is alive
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8000 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1705:16)
---

testcase.name: Status code is 200
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 00_Health / GET /health - service is alive. Test description: Status code is 200. Error message: expected PostmanResponse{ …(5) } to have property 'code'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected PostmanResponse{ …(5) } to have property 'code' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:1).

testcase.name: Response has service status
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 00_Health / GET /health - service is alive. Test description: Response has service status. Error message: "undefined" is not valid JSON. Stacktrace: JSONError: "undefined" is not valid JSON at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:1).

testcase.name: Status code is 201

testsuite.name: 02_Auth / GET /readings/latest - valid token is accepted
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8000 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1705:16)
---

testcase.name: Valid token request returns success
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 02_Auth / GET /readings/latest - valid token is accepted. Test description: Valid token request returns success. Error message: expected undefined to deeply equal 200. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to deeply equal 200 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:4).

testsuite.name: 02_Auth / POST /readings - missing token is rejected on real service
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8000 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1705:16)
---

testcase.name: Missing token returns 401 or 403
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 02_Auth / POST /readings - missing token is rejected on real service. Test description: Missing token returns 401 or 403. Error message: expected [ 401, 403 ] to include undefined. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 401, 403 ] to include undefined at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:5).

testsuite.name: 02_Auth / POST /readings - invalid token is rejected on real service
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8000 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1705:16)
---

testcase.name: Invalid token returns 401 or 403

testcase.name: Invalid payload returns client error
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 03_Negative / POST /readings - missing required field returns validation error. Test description: Invalid payload returns client error. Error message: expected [ 400, 422 ] to include undefined. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 400, 422 ] to include undefined at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:7).

testcase.name: Error response follows ProblemDetails shape
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 03_Negative / POST /readings - missing required field returns validation error. Test description: Error response follows ProblemDetails shape. Error message: "undefined" is not valid JSON. Stacktrace: JSONError: "undefined" is not valid JSON at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:7).

testsuite.name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST /readings - boundary value 80 is accepted
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8000 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1705:16)
---

testcase.name: Boundary value at max returns success
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST /readings - boundary value 80 is accepted. Test description: Boundary value at max returns success. Error message: expected undefined to deeply equal 201. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to deeply equal 201 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:9).

testcase.name: Response confirms accepted reading
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST /readings - boundary value 80 is accepted. Test description: Response confirms accepted reading. Error message: "undefined" is not valid JSON. Stacktrace: JSONError: "undefined" is not valid JSON at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:9).

testsuite.name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST /readings - value 81 is rejected as out of range
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8000 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1705:16)
---

testcase.name: Out-of-range value returns client error
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST /readings - value 81 is rejected as out of range. Test description: Out-of-range value returns client error. Error message: expected [ 400, 422 ] to include undefined. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 400, 422 ] to include undefined at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:10).

testcase.name: Boundary test checks response, not request body
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST /readings - value 81 is rejected as out of range. Test description: Boundary test checks response, not request body. Error message: "undefined" is not valid JSON. Stacktrace: JSONError: "undefined" is not valid JSON at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:10).

testsuite.name: 05_Consumer_side_Smoke / Consumer smoke - Camera/Core can call AI Vision mock

testcase.name: Consumer receives success from provider mock

testsuite.name: 06_Local_only_NonFunctional / POST /readings - local response time threshold
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8000 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1705:16)
---

testcase.name: Local service responds under 1000ms

failure.message: expected undefined to be a number or a date

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 06_Local_only_NonFunctional / POST /readings - local response time threshold. Test description: Local service responds under 1000ms. Error message: expected undefined to be a number or a date. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to be a number or a date at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:13).
